childhood.familyBackground: Jain was born into a business family with interests in manufacturing and textiles. His family had entrepreneurial roots in Indian industry.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 자인은 제조 및 섬유에 관심을 가진 사업 가족에 태어났다.
childhood.education: Delhi University; Indian Institute of Technology
childhood.earlyLife: Jain expanded his family's textile and manufacturing operations into a diversified industrial conglomerate. He became a major player in Indian manufacturing.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 자인은 가족의 섬유 및 제조 사업을 다양한 산업 대기업으로 확장했다.

careerTimeline.event: Took over family textile and manufacturing business
careerTimeline.eventKo: 가족 섬유 및 제조 사업 인수

careerTimeline.event: Expanded into chemicals, pharmaceuticals, and other manufacturing sectors
careerTimeline.eventKo: 화학, 제약 및 기타 제조 부문으로 확장

careerTimeline.event: Achieved billionaire status through diversified industrial portfolio
careerTimeline.eventKo: 다양한 산업 포트폴리오를 통해 억만장자 지위 달성

failures.description: Manufacturing operations faced energy cost challenges and supply disruptions
failures.descriptionKo: 제조 운영이 에너지 비용 도전 및 공급 중단에 직면
failures.lesson: Energy efficiency and supply chain resilience are critical in manufacturing
failures.lessonKo: 에너지 효율성과 공급망 복원력은 제조에서 중요하다

quotes.text: Indian manufacturing must focus on quality and global competitiveness
quotes.textKo: 인도 제조업은 품질 및 글로벌 경쟁력에 집중해야 한다

recommended.title: Make in India
recommended.author: Various
recommended.note: Informed his strategy for building globally competitive Indian manufacturing
recommended.noteKo: 글로벌 경쟁력 있는 인도 제조 구축 전략을 알림

personalTraits.knownFor: Indian manufacturing leadership; textile and chemical expertise; industrial diversification
personalTraits.knownForKo: 인도 제조 리더십; 섬유 및 화학 전문성; 산업 다각화
personalTraits.philanthropy: Supports manufacturing education and worker welfare in India
personalTraits.philanthropyKo: 인도의 제조 교육 및 노동자 복지 지원
